name: prediction-market
title: Prediction Market
summary: AI-resolved, proof-anchored prediction market. Lifecycle: open → bet → resolve (via the ai-oracle) → settle. Composes ai-oracle so applying prediction-market auto-applies ai-oracle first. Resolution receipts are signed by the operator key (✓ signature verified — not TEE-quote) and anchored to 0G Storage (or on-chain opt-in).

env.note: Model to use for AI oracle inference (optional — uses provider default if omitted)
Operator private key for signing resolution receipts and 0G transactions
Set to '1' to commit resolution receipts on-chain via Anchor.sol (default: 0G Storage)
Deployed Anchor contract address — required when OG_ANCHOR_ONCHAIN=1
Namespace prefix for market blobs in 0G Storage
